name: Johnny Frigo
abstract: Johnny Frigo (December 27, 1916 – July 4, 2007) was an American jazz violinist, bassist and songwriter. He appeared in the 1940s as a violinist before working as a bassist.

about_quotes.speaker: John Pizzarelli, Jr.
about_quotes.evidence: Chesky Records makes a record of Johnny Frigo and me and Bucky, Ron Carter or Michael Moore and Butch Miles playing with Johnny Frigo
about_quotes.doc_title: John Pizzarelli, Jr. interviewed by Monk Rowe, New York City, New York, January 29, 2000 [interview 1 of 2]

about_quotes.speaker: Herb Ellis
about_quotes.evidence: Well we were all three with Jimmy Dorsey. And I think the bassist Johnny Frigo
about_quotes.doc_title: Herb Ellis interviewed by Monk Rowe, Scottsdale, Arizona, April 16, 2000 [interview 2 of 2]
